description_long: This imposing stone castle features a square layout with four prominent corner towers, each rising above the fortified walls. The walls are crenellated with battlements, providing defensive positions along the perimeter. The structure includes a central gatehouse with a large, reinforced entrance, flanked by two of the towers. Rows of narrow windows and arrow slits are visible along the walls, enhancing its defensive capabilities. The stonework is uniform and weathered, giving the castle a robust and ancient appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of medieval European fortifications, built for both defense and authority.
description: A large, square stone castle with four corner towers, battlements, and a central fortified gatehouse. The walls are lined with arrow slits and narrow windows, giving it a strong medieval character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gatehouse flanked by two towers and the full extent of the battlemented walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the wall, rows of arrow slits, and the two side towers.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite gatehouse and towers visible.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, but with the main entrance gate visible at the bottom center.
